items.name: DataLogicEngine
items.description: Enterprise AI platform built on the Universal Knowledge Graph (UKG), featuring a 17-Axis Knowledge Framework, 10-Layer Truth Engine, multi-agent orchestration, GraphRAG, MCP integration, explainable reasoning, governance, compliance, and end-to-end audit traceability.

items.name: search_evals
items.description: 🔍 Evaluate web search APIs with our framework, testing accuracy and relevance across multiple AI agents and benchmarks for better information retrieval.

items.name: digital-life
items.description: Digital Life · Life Engineering — A runtime framework for persistent, autonomous LLM agents

items.name: agent-red-team
items.description: Security testing framework for autonomous AI agents. Detects privilege escalation vulnerabilities in LLM agents before they reach production.

items.name: autogen-financial-analysis
items.description: 🔍 Analyze financial data seamlessly with the AutoGen Financial Analysis System, offering risk assessment and quantitative insights through a multi-Agent framework.

items.name: haystack
items.description: 🛠️ Build powerful search systems effortlessly with Haystack, a framework for developing end-to-end question answering and search applications.

items.name: freecad-bim-agent
items.description: This repository contains a MCP server that provides a bridge between AI  and FreeCAD. Built on the FastMCP framework, it enables AI assistants to generate, modify, analyze, and visually verify complex 3D models, parametric parts, and complete BIM structures directly in FeeCAD.

items.name: elysia
items.description: 🌳 Leverage Elysia to build dynamic agents using decision trees, adapting to your environment for efficient data retrieval from Weaviate clusters.
